Role Hierarchy

Owner / Director

Access: Everything (Read + Financial Reports)
Strategic oversight. Revenue, P&L, fleet ROI. Cannot edit operational data directly.

Fleet Manager

Access: Trips, Vehicles, Drivers, Routes, Inspections
Manages vehicle allocation, trip planning, driver assignment. No billing access.

Operations Executive

Access: Trips (create), Vehicles (view), Drivers (view)
Day-to-day dispatch. Creates trips, tracks live status. No financial visibility.

Workshop Manager

Access: Work Orders, Service, Parts, Inspections, Vendors
Manages maintenance workflow. Creates WOs, orders parts. No trip or client access.

Accounts Manager

Access: Invoices, Clients, Driver Ledger, Expenses, Reports
Owns billing cycle. Creates invoices, settles advances. No trip operations access.

Super Admin

Access: Everything + User Management + Settings
Full system control. Manages users, roles, configurations, and integrations.

Add New User
